understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+'), avoiding lethal hazards (spikes 'u'/'v') and using clicks when needed to open a path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK/UNDO. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (e.g., 'o','m','w'), reach the goal, or die by landing on spikes. CLICK targets a specific coordinate to remove a breakable/clickable block ('x') without moving the player, typically to create or unblock a fall path. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
